gh_c4236f2f682f1448af33b055.description:
📍 Location: Remote & Hybrid work model 

🛠 Key Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain modern, responsive web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
Collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and backend engineers to deliver high-quality user experiences.
Optimize application performance, accessibility, and cross-browser compatibility.
Participate in code reviews, testing, and continuous improvement of development processes.

🎯 What We Are Looking For:

Experience: 3+ years of professional frontend development experience.
Core Tech: Strong proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Next.js, HTML5, and CSS3.
Frontend Skills: Experience with state management, responsive design, component-based architecture, and modern frontend tooling.
Soft Skills: Strong communication, problem-solving abilities, and the ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment.

📩 Interested?
Contact me via Telegram(@chain_empires)
